why_it_matters: This is a SNF admission-day note focused on goals and plan; a completed hospital discharge is background administrative detail not central to documenting this visit.

Setting realistic expectations that neuropathy and vision symptoms may improve with glycemic control but without guaranteed degree/timing supports informed engagement and adherence, and its omission leaves counseling documentation incomplete.

The patient is tearful, isolated, and struggling to accept facility care, so documenting emotional support and reframing the stay as short-term rehab is central to addressing her psychosocial distress and care plan.
